Title: Unified platform shell + navbar
Touches: Hub; all app layouts; WorkOS feature flags; routing
Description: Role-aware sidebar replacing Hub launcher grid. Update each app's LoggedLayout to shared nav. Studio sections for all users — Console sections for authorized users.

Title: Engagements rename
Description: Rename Playbook routes/components to Engagements throughout Workbench and Client Portal. Significant codebase rename — no behavioral change.

Title: New top-level Playbook
Touches: Workbench; winning_moves table; new Playbook routes
Description: Create Playbook as new section in Workbench. Move winning moves UI from inside activities. Add narrative/context content area (markdown-based).

Title: Cards behind flag
Touches: WorkOS feature flags; Cards app (3004); navigation
Description: Set feature-cards default off for new orgs. Remove Cards from Studio nav. App stays functional for existing flagged users.

Title: Child tasks + assignments + collaboration
Touches: activities table; activity_assignments; activity_comments; Workbench; Client Portal
Description: Add parent_activity_id (self-referential FK) to activities table. Nested CRUD API. Tree UI in Workbench + Client Portal. Assign tasks to any user (Tatoma consultants AND client-side users) — triggers notifications and surfaces in personal task views. Public comments tree (visible to client + Tatoma). Private notes tree (Tatoma consultants only). Both threaded with @mention support and notification hooks.

Title: Date range timeframes
Touches: activities table; Client Portal 'Our Planning'; Workbench planning view
Description: Migrate time_bucket enum to start_date + end_date. Quarter membership computed from dates. Enables Gantt-style timeline rendering.

Title: Prompt library consolidation
Touches: Prompts app (3003); Library app (3005); collections; sharing; S2S card generation
Description: Merge Prompts AI structuring with Library's collection/sharing model into unified Studio section. Personal library — team sharing — AI-assisted refinement. Primary lock-in feature.

Title: Personal use case generator
Touches: Groq integration; new use case tables; Prompts links
Description: Conversational AI flow using Groq. Suggests use cases based on role/tasks/pain points. Personal use case library with 'try it' links to relevant prompts.

Title: Lightweight LMS engine
Touches: Academy app (3002); new tables (learning_paths; modules; assessments)
Description: Learning paths — modules (markdown + video + exercise + assessment) — progress tracking. Replaces Academy JSONB carousel. Assessment engine with JSONB quiz arrays and pass/fail.

Title: AI Foundations content
Description: First learning path (6–8 modules). Co-founder outlines + AI-assisted expansion. Needs team involvement for content quality bar.

Title: Certificate generation
Description: Branded PDF on learning path completion. Verification URL for external sharing.

Title: xAPI statement generation
Touches: xAPI endpoint; module events; Cornerstone/SAP SuccessFactors integration
Description: Emit xAPI statements for key events (module started — completed — assessment scored — certificate earned). Build export endpoint. Enterprise LMS unlock.

Title: Nudge system v1
Touches: Resend; notifications table; notification_recipients table; webhook pipeline
Description: Weekly digest email via Resend. Reuse existing notification infrastructure.

Title: Guided refresh workflow
Touches: Workbench; research pipeline patterns; document upload; context extraction
Description: 4 weeks pre-session: TL completes step-by-step questionnaire (progress sentiment — winning move updates — blockers — new use cases). AI-generated summary for TL + consultant.

Title: Quarterly check-in support
Description: Pre-session briefing page (auto-generated from refresh + activity data). Session outcome capture. Quarter-over-quarter comparison view.

Title: Health signals + scorecard
Description: Activity overdue/stale detection — progress indicators per winning move — transformation scorecard widget. Computed on page load — cached.

Title: Sprint workflow v1
Description: 'Request a Sprint' flow from activities or use cases. Brief template with AI-assisted generation. Types: Spike (~2d) — Sprint (~1w) — Special (variable).

Title: Prompt refiner
Description: Paste a prompt that gave bad results — describe what went wrong — get AI-suggested improvements with explanations. Builds on existing Groq structuring.

Title: Department use case templates
Touches: use case tables; employee department tag
Description: Pre-built suggestions for HR — Marketing — Finance — Ops — IT — Sales. Auto-suggested based on employee's department tag.

Title: Training session support
Description: Session catalog — materials hub (pre/during/post resources) — attendance tracking — post-session follow-up nudge.

Title: Org-level analytics dashboard
Touches: analytics views; cron jobs; department breakdown
Description: Adoption metrics for TLs: registered employees — active users — path completions — use cases discovered — prompts created. Department breakdown. Computed daily via cron.

Title: xAPI full endpoint
Description: Full endpoint that customers can configure their LMS to pull from (Cornerstone — SAP SuccessFactors etc.).

Title: Nudge system v2
Description: Health alerts (stale > 30d) — refresh reminders (4w + 2w) — status change notifications (consultant updates → TL email).

Title: Standardized relationships
Description: Implement Asiot template as canonical relationship model. Document patterns. Apply to all clients.

Title: Studio integration (Cards)
Touches: Cards app (3004); RAG pipeline; GenUI; knowledge files; Studio browsing
Description: Cards reintroduced as inline tools within Studio. Run a card from a prompt — use case — or learning exercise. Card catalog becomes part of Studio browsing.

Title: Unified tool experience
Touches: Prompts; use cases; Cards; cross-reference links
Description: Prompts + use cases + cards as one coherent Studio with cross-references. A prompt generates a card. A use case links to prompts and cards. Module exercises invoke cards.

Title: Sprint tracking + outcomes
Description: Full lifecycle: brief → scheduled → in_progress → delivered → reviewed. Post-sprint deliverables captured back into Playbook.

Title: Relations view
Description: React Flow dependency graph using the standardized relationship model from Q2.

Title: Timeline + Stream views
Description: Chronological activity feed + personalized stream. Uses existing activity_log data.

Title: Quarter-over-quarter reporting
Touches: analytics; completions; use cases; sprints; learning adoption
Description: The renewal conversation view. Completion rates trending — use cases growing — sprints delivered — learning adoption from Studio side.

Title: Export capabilities
Description: Shareable PDF/summary of transformation progress for stakeholder reporting.

Title: Performance optimization
Touches: caching; rate limiting; cost controls per org
Description: Caching strategy for 100-1000 user clients (read-heavy workload). Rate limiting on AI features. Cost controls per org.

Title: Studio content sharing
Description: Employees share use cases + prompts within their org. Approval workflow for shared content.

Title: Advanced notification preferences
Description: Per-user toggles for email types (weekly digest — status changes — refresh reminders — learning nudges).

Title: Cross-client template library
Description: Anonymized best-of prompts and use case templates across all clients. The beginning of Tatoma's content moat.
